generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T CORNUS CIRCINATA. C. Circinata, L'Her. Natural order , Cornaceæ. Common name , Round-leaved cornel. Preparation , Tincture of the bark. Authorities. 1 , Dr. Marcy's provings on self with 3d dil., from 2 to 5-drop doses, N. Am. J. of Hom., 3, 278; 2 , same prover, repeated doses of 10 to 60 drops of tincture; 3 , Dr. Crane, 10 to 40 drops of tincture; 4 , Dr. Fullgraff, with 3d dil.; 5 , same, with 10 to 120 drops of tincture; 6 , Dr. Freeman, with 10 to 150 drops of tincture; 7 , Mrs. A. took the 12th dil.; 8 , Master C. took 1st dil.; 9 , Master J. took tincture, 20-drop doses three times in one day, at 9, 10 and 11 A.M. MIND. ► Emotional. ► Depression of spirits (fourth and sixth days), [3] ; (sixth day), [5] ; (fourth day), [6] . ► Unusual depression of spirits (twelfth day), [1] . ► Great depression of spirits (ninth day), [7] . ► Great depression of spirits; weak and petulant (thirteenth and fourteenth days), [2] . ► Peevishness (eighth day), [7] . ► Indifference with respect to matters which usually excite interest (eighth day), [1] . ► Intellectual. ► Disinclination to think, read, or work (seventh day), [3] . ► Inability to apply the mind with vigor (seventh day), [1] . ► Inability to concentrate the thoughts (third day), [6] . [10.] ► Difficulty in fixing the mind upon any subject (fourth day), [3] . ► Difficulty in fixing the mind, and in attending properly to ordinary affairs (thirteenth day), [1] . ► Reads without appreciating the meaning of words; inability to concentrate the mind upon any subject (fourth day), [5] . ► Confusion of ideas (eighth day), [1] ; (thirteenth day), (150 drops), [6] . ► Towards night, the mind became confused, the stupid, sleepy sensation became more strongly marked, and there was an almost entire inability to concentrate the thoughts upon any subject (tenth day), [2] . ► Forgetful of little things (third day), [6] . HEAD. ► Confusion and Vertigo. ► Confused feeling in the head (ninth day), [3] . ► Confused feeling in the head on rising in the morning (sixth day), [2] . ► Heavy confused feeling in the top of the head; with some drowsiness (after one hour, first day), (20 drops), [6] . ► Dull, heavy, confused feeling in the head (third day), [6] . [20.] ► Giddiness (first day), [9] . ► Giddiness, on shaking the head, or on stooping (seventh day), [7] . ► General Head. ► Congestion of blood to the head and face (seventh day), [2] . ► Lightness of the head (twelfth day), [2] ; (ninth day), [8] . ► Head feels light (seventh day), [7] . ► Heaviness of the head (eleventh day), [2] ; (after one hour), (60 drops), (thirteenth day), [6] . ► Heavy feeling in the head (third day), [9] . ► Dull heavy pain over the whole head (sixth day), [8] . ► Dull heavy pain through the head; increased by walking, stooping, or shaking the head (thirteenth day), [1] . ► Headache (first day), [9] . [30.] ► Awoke this morning at 6 o'clock, with headache, distension and dull pains in the bowels, and urgent desire to go to stool. During the evacuation, which was thin, of a dark green color, and very offensive, the pains became more acute, and there were slight symptoms of tenesmus. The discharge was accompanied with copious emissions of foul-smelling flatus (fourth day), [2] . ► Slight headache and drowsiness (fifth day), [4] . ► Slight tensive-aching pain in the whole head (after two hours), continuing for about an hour, when the action of the dose subsided entirely (first day), [6] . ► Dull pains in the head (second and third days), (sixty drops), [6] ; (third day), [8] ; (fourth day), [2] . ► Dull pains throughout the whole brain (after two hours, tenth day), [2] . ► Dull pain throughout the whole brain (fourth day); dull, heavy pain (fifth day), [3] . ► Deepseated, dull pain in the brain, under the centre of the skull (after half an hour, fifth day), [5] . ► Fulness of the brain, in the morning on rising (sixth day), [2] . ► Slight fulness in the head, which was relieved by a copious, thin, and bilious discharge from the bowels. This evacuation was succeeded by slight tenesmus, and considerable burning at the anus, which lasted half an hour (fifteenth day), [1] . ► Sense of fulness at the head (eighth day), [1] . [40.] ► Head feels too full and confused (sixth day), [8] . ► Drawing sensation from the back of the head to the nose (second day), [5] . ► Shooting pains through the whole brain (eighth day), [7] . ► Pulsations extending from the front the back part of the head (fifth day), [5] . ► Forehead. ► Dull pain in the forehead (after half an hour, twelfth day), [6] . ► Dull pain in the forehead (sixth day), [3] ; (after half an hour, twelfth day), [6] . ► Dull pain in the forehead and vertex (after two hours, thirteenth day), (60 drops), [6] . ► Dull pain in the forehead, accompanied with rumbling in the bowels (after two hours, first day), [2] . ► Temples. ► Headache in the temples, during the afternoon and evening (second day), [8] . ► During the day, have been suffering from severe aching pains through the temples, and on the top of the head (fifth day), [2] . [50.] ► Dull throbbing pains in the temples (fourth day), [6] . ► Dull throbbing pains in the temples and sides of the head (second day), [5] . ► Severe pulsative pains in the temporal regions; these pains gradually passed off during the afternoon and night (fifth day), [5] . ► Vertex. ► Dull throbbing pains in the vertex (seventh day), [2] . ► Occiput. ► Pain in the back of the head (after half an hour, fifth day), [5] . ► Drawing pains in the back part of the head (ninth day), [7] . ► Deepseated pulsatory pain in the occipital and parietal regions (third day), [5] . ► External Head. ► Aggravation of an habitual scurfy eruption of the scalp (seventeenth day), [1] . ► Soreness of the scalp (seventh day), [2] . ► Itching of the scalp, the legs, and feet, increased by rubbing or scratching; after scratching, a painful burning sensation remains for some time (sixteenth day), [1] . EYE. [60.] ► Eyes dull and heavy, as after a debauch (second day), [6] . ► Hollowness of the eyes (second day), [5] . ► Eyes sunken (sixth day), [2] . ► Sunken eyes, with slight discoloration under the eyes (second day), [6] . ► Dark circle around the eyes (fifth day), [5] . ► Dark circle under the eyes (second day), [5] . ► Brow and Orbit. ► Slight pain over the right supraorbital ridge (twelfth day), [6] . ► Very heavy sensation around the eyes (fifth day), [5] . ► Contracting feeling around the eyes (fifth day), [5] . ► Aching pain over the right eyebrow (fourteenth day), [6] . ► Lids. [70.] ► Heaviness of the eyelids (eighth day), [7] ; (after two hours), (tenth day), [2] ; (eleventh day), [1] . ► Conjunctiva. ► Yellow color of the conjunctiva (second day), [5] ; (sixth day), [3] ; (eleventh day), [1] . ► Yellowish tinge of the conjunctiva, and of the face (second day), [6] . ► Ball. ► Aching pain in the eyeballs (seventh day), [2] . ► Aching pain through the eyeballs (eleventh day), [1] . ► Dull pain in the eyeballs (fifth day), [5] . ► Very dull feeling over the eyeballs (fifth day), [5] . ► Soreness of the eyeballs (fifth day), [6] . NOSE. ► Some symptoms of coryza early this morning (sixth day), [4] . ► Prickling sensation in the nasal canal (fifth day), [5] . FACE. ► Objective. [80.] ► Expression of countenance dull and sickly (eleventh day), [1] . ► General expression indicative of great physical and mental depression (sixth day), [2] . ► Sallowness of the countenance (tenth day), [1] , [2] . ► Sallow countenance (second and sixth days), [5] ; (thirteenth day), (150 drops), [6] . ► Yellow complexion (eighth and ninth days); still somewhat yellow (fourteenth day), [2] . ► The countenance is yellowish (sixth day), [2] . ► Subjective. ► Burning of the face, hands, and feet (fifth day), [8] . ► On rising, in the morning, felt a burning sensation over the whole face, feeling as if it was flushed, but without redness of the cheeks (fifth day), [3] . MOUTH. ► Tongue. ► Whitish fur upon the tongue (fifth day), [6] . ► Tongue covered with a whitish fur (sixth and eleventh days), [2] . [90.] ► Yellowish fur upon the tongue (sixth day), [3] . ► Tongue covered with a thin yellowish fur (eighth day); slightly furred (tenth day), [1] . ► General Mouth. ► Dryness of the mouth (sixth day), [7] . ► Mouth and throat dry (sixth day), [2] . ► Smarting in the mouth and throat (second day), [8] . ► Taste. ► Clammy taste (eighth day), [1] . ► Insipid taste in the mouth (eleventh day), [2] . ► Pungent taste in the mouth (fifth day), [6] . ► Bad taste in the mouth (sixth day), [7] ; (third day), [9] . ► Bitter taste (fifth day), [8] ; (ninth day), [3] ; (twelfth day), [1] . STOMACH. ► Appetite. [100.] ► Impaired appetite (sixth day), [5] . ► Poor appetite (fifth day), [6] ; (tenth day), [7] . ► Small appetite (third day), [9] . ► Loss of appetite (sixth day), [3] ; (twelfth and nineteenth days), [1] . ► No appetite (fourth day), [8] . ► Aversion to food (eleventh day), [2] . ► Aversion to all kinds of food and drinks (twelfth day), [1] . ► Aversion to meat and bread (eighth day), [7] . ► Thirst. ► Desire for sour drinks (eleventh day), [2] . ► Eructation. ► Eructations (eighth and ninth days), [2] . [110.] ► Empty eructations (sixth day), [6] . ► Bitter eructations (ninth day), [7] . ► Nausea. ► Nausea (second day), [5] ; (fifth day), [8] ; (ninth day), [3] ; (tenth day), [7] ; (twelfth day), [1] . ► Nausea, at 10 A.M. (after two hours, tenth day), [2] . ► Nausea, with feeling of debility and languor (thirteenth day), (160 drops), [6] . ► Slight nausea (after one hour, thirteenth day), (60 drops), [6] . ► Sick at the stomach, at 1 P.M. (first day), [9] . ► Stomach. ► Distension of the stomach and bowels with wind (sixth day), [3] . ► Empty feeling in the stomach (eighth and ninth days), [2] . ► Weakness in the stomach (fifth day), [8] . [120.] ► Pain in the pit of the stomach during dinner, with distension of the bowels from wind, which were relieved by a loose, windy stool immediately after dinner, of a dark and bilious character (second day), [6] . ► Burning sensation in the stomach, lasting an hour and a half (after half an hour, first day), [3] . ► Sensation of burning in the stomach and bowels (second day), [8] . ► Fulness and oppression in the stomach and bowels (sixth day), [7] . ► Gnawing, faint feeling in the stomach (ninth day), [3] . ► Heavy pulsation in the stomach (after nine hours, second day), [5] . ABDOMEN. ► Umbilical. ► Dull pain in the umbilical region (after two hours, tenth day), [2] . ► General Abdomen. ► Distension of the bowels, with occasional griping pains (eleventh day), [1] . ► Constant working in the bowels, as if their contents were all in motion (after three hours, second day), [5] . ► Rumbling in the bowels (thirteenth day), (150 drops), [6] . [130.] ► Rumbling of wind in the bowels (first day), [9] ; (seventh day), [2] . ► Large emission of very offensive flatus (after one hour, second day), [5] . ► Slight uneasiness in the bowels (eleventh day), [2] . ► Uneasy sensations in the abdomen (fourth day), [6] . ► Vague pains, and general sense of uneasiness in the bowels (thirteenth day), [1] . ► Fulness and uneasiness in the bowels (twelfth day), [1] . ► Griping in the bowels, with inclination for stool, but could not effect anything, at 2 P.M., [9] . ► Slight griping pains in the abdomen, accompanied with rumbling of wind, at 10 o'clock; these pains were experienced over nearly the whole abdomen, but chiefly in the vicinity of the umbilicus, and they did not subside until bedtime, at 11 1/2 o'clock (second day), [1] . ► Occasional griping pains in the bowels (fourth day), [8] . ► Griping-shooting pains from the centre of the chest (apparently in the thoracic muscles), down to the lower part of the abdomen; the pains coming on severely at intervals, and then remitting (third day), [5] . [140.] ► Occasional drawing pains from the stomach to the lower part of the abdomen (first day), [9] . ► Dull pains in the bowels (third day), [8] ; (fourth day), [2] . ► Hypogastrium. ► Rumbling of wind in the lower part of the bowels (sixth day), [6] . ► Sense of weight in the lower part of the abdomen (ninth day), [7] . ► At about 11 A.M., felt a griping pain in the lower part of the bowels, with rumbling of wind and frequent discharge of offensive flatus (after three hours, third day), [2] . RECTUM AND ANUS. ► Frequent inclinations to go to stool, but no satisfactory discharges, the result being a small quantity of dark and slimy fluid, and much offensive flatus (second, third, and fourth days), [3] . ► Some desire for stool (second day), [8] . ► Urging to stool (twelfth day), [1] . ► Some urging to stool (thirteenth day), (150 drops), [6] . ► Awoke at 5 in the morning, with a sensation in the rectum as if he must have an evacuation (second day), [3] . [150.] ► Increased sensation in the rectum, urging to stool. He rose at once to dress, fearing, however, that he should not have time on account of the increasing desire to evacuate. Accompanying this sensation in the rectum there was a bearing-down pain in the abdomen, which contributed to the disposition to evacuate (twenty minutes after 20 drops, second day), [2] . ► On rising felt an urging to stool (sixth day), [2] . STOOL. ► Diarrha. ► Loose, scanty stool at 9 o'clock in the morning, attended with tenesmus, burning at the anus, and discharge of offensive, wind (fifth day), [2] . ► Large, loose, and dark stool, with some griping and tenesmus, in the morning (seventh day), [8] . ► Small and somewhat loose evacuation from the bowels, with much discharge of offensive flatus, and burning at the anus, in the morning (second day), [9] . ► A copious stool, slightly loose, and attended with slight pressing-down pain in the rectum (third day). Stool looser, and more scanty than usual, with slight burning pain in the rectum during the evacuation (fourth day). A slightly relaxed stool at usual hour this morning (fifth day). Stool this morning thin and scanty, with pressing pain in the rectum, smarting at the anus after the discharge, dull feeling in the head, drowsiness and lassitude (sixth and seventh days). Stool thin and scanty, and attended with some tenesmus, griping in the umbilical region, rumbling of wind, and large discharge of offensive flatus (ninth day), [1] . ► Copious dark stool of natural consistence attended with a pressing-down sensation in the rectum (eighth day), [3] . ► Dark, thin, and moderately large stool, with some tenesmus and burning at the anus (second day), [3] . ► Dark, thin stool, with slight tenesmus, on rising in the morning (third day), [6] . ► A small discharge of bilious and slimy matter, accompanied with copious emissions of wind and some tenesmus. During and after the discharge, a severe burning pain was felt at the anus, and a short distance within the rectum (tenth day), [2] . [160.] ► Very offensive stool of a bilious character, and rather loose (after two hours and a half); another passage rather less loose and less offensive (after seven hours, second day), [5] . ► Constipation. ► Stool, hard, dry, and scanty, with slight pressing in the rectum, at 9 P.M. (tenth day), [7] . ► Stool scanty and dark-colored, and attended with burning pain at the anus, at 7 o'clock in the morning (seventh day), [7] . ► Towards night, a scanty stool, with burning at the anus during the discharge (twelfth day), [2] . ► Very early in the morning was obliged to get up to relieve the bowels, but could do nothing at all satisfactory, or which gave relief, the discharge consisting of only a few slimy lumps, and being attended with pressing and smarting at the anus (third day), [8] . URINARY ORGANS. ► Urine scanty and red (fourth day), [3] . ► Urine scanty and red; has to pass water oftener than usual (sixth day), [8] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Strong and persistent erections frequently during the night (fourth night), [3] . CHEST. ► Choking sensation in the upper part of the thorax (tenth day), [7] . ► Stitches in the chest and back (after two hours, tenth day), [2] . [170.] ► Stitches in the chest and under the right scapula (seventh day), [2] . ► On rising in the morning, a sore feeling in the chest and back, as if the parts had been bruised (third day), [5] . ► Sensation of dragging or bearing down on each side of the thorax (second day), [5] . HEART AND PULSE. ► Accelerated pulsation of the heart (second day), [5] . NECK AND BACK. ► Neck. ► Drawing pains in the nape of the neck (ninth day), [7] . ► Back. ► Dull pains in the back (third day), [8] . ► Dull pains in the back and knees (twelfth day), [1] . ► Pain in the lower part of the back and abdomen (second day), [5] . ► Sore pain in the lumbar region, worse by bending forward (second day), [5] . ► Dull pains in the small of the back (fourth day), [2] . INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. [180.] ► Weakness of the legs (sixth day), [5] . ► Weakness and trembling of the legs (fifth day), [5] . ► Weakness and weary feeling in the legs (sixth day), [3] . ► Weary feeling in the legs (fifth day), [2] . ► Tired feeling in the legs on walking, or ascending stairs (eighth day), [8] . GENERAL SYMPTOMS. ► Objective. ► General loss of energy (second day), [5] . ► Almost entire prostration of the mental and physical energies (fifth day), [3] . ► Weakness (third day), [8] ; (fifth day), [2] . ► Unusual weakness (third day), [9] . ► Debility (twelfth day), [2] . [190.] ► Slight debility (eighth to tenth day), [8] . ► Some debility (fifth day), [6] . ► Considerable debility (fourth day); increased (fifth day), [5] . ► Great debility (fifth day), [8] . ► General debility (tenth day), [1] . ► Subjective. ► Feeling of indolence and loss of physical energy (fifth day), [5] . ► Sense of fatigue (fourth day), [6] . ► Felt fatigued through the forenoon (eighth day), [7] . ► Disinclined to mental or physical labor (seventh day), [5] ; (twelfth day), [2] . ► Complete disinclination to mental or corporeal exertion (ninth day), [1] ; (thirteenth day), (150 drops), [6] . [200.] ► Dread of making any exertion (eighth day), [8] . ► General sense of weariness (first day), [9] . ► General sense of weakness (second day), [5] . ► Felt weak and languid, on waking in the morning (ninth day), [1] . ► Sense of debility and lassitude (seventh day), [1] . ► Sense of debility and fatigue (seventh day), [2] . ► Languid (nineteenth day), [1] . ► Lassitude (fifth day), [3] ; (eighth and ninth days), [2] ; (ninth day), [8] ; (twelfth day), [1] . ► Lassitude during the day (second and third days), (60 drops), [6] . ► Unusual lassitude and debility (fourteenth day), [1] . [210.] ► Great lassitude and apathy, in the morning, on rising (sixth and thirteenth days), [2] . SKIN. ► Objective. ► A fine scarlet rash on the breast, attended with itching, but which disappeared in two or three hours (eleventh day), [2] . ► Subjective. ► Itching of the skin all over the body (fourth day), [8] . ► Itching in different parts of the body (eleventh day), [2] . ► Itching of the skin at different points (fifth day), [6] . ► Prickling of the arms and legs (first day), [9] . ► Itching of the integuments of the head and legs, and of the nasal mucous membrane (fifth day), [2] . ► Occasional paroxysm of itching of the skin of the back, legs, and feet, coming on generally during the evening (forty-third day), [1] . ► Itching on the legs, thighs, and around the labia (eighth day), [7] . SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepiness. ► Great inclination to sleep (fifth day), [2] ; (twelfth day), [1] ; (thirteenth day), (100 drops), [6] . [220.] ► Drowsiness, [3] ; (second, third, and eighteenth days), 60 drops, [6] ; second, fourth, and fifth days), [8] ; (fifth day), [5] ; (seventh day), [3] ; (seventh, eighth, ninth, and eleventh days), [1] . ► Drowsiness; almost irresistible desire to sleep (second day), [5] . ► Great drowsiness (after two hours, tenth day), [2] . ► Very great drowsiness, with heavy feeling in the head, and sensation of emptiness of the stomach (after half an hour). Pain in the head and drowsiness became so great that he could not well endure it (after six hours). Strong coffee afforded speedy relief to the headache and drowsiness (second day), [3] . ► Drowsy (eighth day), [7] . ► Began to feel drowsy at 1 P.M. (first day), [9] . ► During the day have been very drowsy, and disinclined to make any effort (fourth day), [2] . ► Sleepy and stupid feeling (fifth day), [8] . ► Slept soundly this night, a circumstance quite unusual on former occasions when he had taken coffee, as this beverage had always before kept him awake through the entire night (second day), [3] . ► Slept more profoundly and later than usual (fourth night), [1] . [230.] ► Slept very soundly, but woke at 7, without feeling refreshed (fifth night), [7] . ► Slept very soundly last night, but woke up this morning without feeling refreshed as usual by sleep (fifth morning). Slept very soundly last night, and awoke an hour later than usual (sixth morning), [2] . ► Sleeplessness. ► Restless during the night, continually turning from side to side (second night), [8] . ► Dreams. ► Sleep disturbed by unpleasant dreams (eighth night), [1] . ► Sleep disturbed by unpleasant dreams. Awoke once by a frightful dream, in a profuse perspiration (eighteenth night), [1] . ► Slept more soundly than usual, but had frightful dreams (second day), [6] . FEVER. ► Chilliness. ► Chilly sensations, succeeded by transient flushes of heat (eleventh day), [1] . ► Coldness, followed by flushes of heat and perspiration (fourth day), [8] . ► Hands and feet cold (seventh day), [8] . ► Heat. ► Transient flushes of heat pervading the whole body (eighth day), [7] . [240.] ► Flushes of heat, followed by easy general perspiration (eighth day), [1] . ► Flushes of heat and coldness in alternation, followed by cold perspiration (seventh day), [2] . ► Heat on the top of the head (sixth day), [7] . ► Unusual heat in the head and face in the morning on rising (sixth day), [2] . ► Head hot (seventh day), [8] . ► Head and face hot (fourth day), [8] . ► Face and hands hot (eleventh day), [2] . ► Flushes of heat to the head and face (fourth day), [6] . ► Sweat. ► Disposition to perspire on the slightest exertion (eleventh day), [1] . ► Slight exercise causes free general perspiration and unusual fatigue (eighteenth day), [1] . [250.] ► Easy perspiration (sixth day), [6] . ► Rather copious perspiration on making slight exertions (after two hours, tenth day), [2] . ► Copious general perspiration, which seems clammy (soon); subsiding in about an hour, and succeeded by a general chilliness (thirteenth day), (100 drops), [6] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), On rising, confused feeling in head; at 6 o'clock, on waking, headache; on rising, fulness of the brain; early, headache in temples; on rising, burning over face, etc.; on rising, urging to stool; at 9 o'clock, loose stool ; on rising, diarrhic, etc.; stool; very early, unsatisfactory stool; on rising, sore feeling in chest; on waking, felt weak, etc.; on rising, lassitude, etc.; on rising, heat in head, etc. ► ( Afternoon ), Headache in temples. ► ( Evening ), Towards night, mind confused, etc.; headache in temples. ► ( Bending forward ), Pain in lumbar region. ► ( During dinner ), Pain in pit of stomach, etc. ► ( Rubbing or scratching ), Itching of scalp, etc. ► ( On shaking head ), Giddiness; pain through head. ► ( During stool ), Pain in bowels. ► ( On stooping ), Giddiness; pain through head. ► ( Walking ), Pain through head. ► Amelioration. ► ( Stool ), Fulness in head. Clinical: Aphthæ; Bilious headache; Diarrhœa; Dysentery; Eczema; Intermittent fever; Jaundice; Liver derangement; Mucous membranes, ulcers of; Pruritus vulvæ; Urticaria

Frequent inclination to expand chest by taking a long breath. Cough with sharp stitches in chest. Dry, spasmodic cough, or tedious, chronic cough, with mucous expectoration. Weakness of extremities. Coldness of hands and feet after a loose stool. Weakness and fatigue of arms. Burning and itching sensation in hands and arms. Coldness of hands following a loose stool. Pain in r. hip while lying in bed. Legs weak and tremulous, particularly when ascending. Itching on legs and thighs; burning sensation in feet. General debility and impaired mental energy, with great drowsiness; in heat of summer.

General debility and impaired mental energy, with great drowsiness ; in heat of Summer. Frequent : sighing ; gagging ; chilly sensations ; ineffectual urging to stool ; diarrhœa ; inclination to urinate ; erections ; inclination to expand chest, by taking a long breath. Constant : dizziness ; tendency to sleep ; working of bowels ; tickling in chest ; sweating. Daily : paroxysms of ague. Chronic : hepatitis and bilious derangement ; diarrhœa ; cough. Right : aching and throbbing over eyebrow ; stitch in chest ; pain in hip. Left : eye weak ; stitches in region of clavicle extending towards right side ; cutting in ribs, with pain under scapula ; tension in arm. From front to back : pulsations in head. As if a cloud was over left eye ; as if she would break in two at waist ; as if pains would give her a twist while running up body ; as if eyeballs and lids were pressed down by a weight ; as if bowels were all in motion ; as if a knife was thrust into right chest ; as if a piece of flesh was being forcibly twisted out under left scapula ; as of a jerk or shock in nape of neck. Pain : deep seated, under vertex ; in bowels ; in elbows and wrists ; in stomach ; in pit of stomach ; in right hip ; in back ; in chest, abdomen and legs ; at waist. Stitches : sharp, in chest, in region of left clavicle extending towards right side ; in right chest ; in wrist joints. Darting, needle-like pain : in arm. Prickling : in nose and nasal bones ; heat of whole surface with ; in skin. Cutting : in whole head ; in left ribs. Shooting : in head ; from centre of chest down to lower part of abdomen ; in brain. Lightning-like pains : run up side of trunk or body. Boring : in shoulder blades. Drawing : from back of head to nose. Tensive pain : throughout whole head. Tension : in flexor muscles, also in left arm. Burning : in face ; of cheeks ; in mouth, throat and stomach ; in hands and arms ; in feet ; heat of whole surface with ; in skin. Contraction : around eyes ; from centre of chest down to lower part of abdomen. Bearing down : in abdomen and rectum ; on each side of chest. Dragging : on each side of chest ; in lumbar region ; in sides of thorax. Rheumatic or neuralgic pains : in chest, back and limbs. Neuralgic pains : begin in elbow, extend to hand and shoulder, pass down right side, then up left and settle about heart. Throbbing : over right eyebrow ; in temples ; in head. Pulsating : headache in temples ; deep-seated pains in occipital and parietal regions ; pains in head, stomach and bowels. Pulsations : from front to back of head ; in chest. Griping : in umbilical region ; from centre of chest to lower part of abdomen. Cramps : in popliteal spaces ; from sides of waist running towards pubes. Colic : pains. Smarting : in mouth and throat ; stomach. Bruised feeling : in chest and back. Soreness : of eyeballs ; of chest ; in chest and back ; in lumbar region. Aching : over right eyebrow ; in head ; through eyeballs. Choking : in upper part of thorax. Confused pain : in head. Dull pain : over eyeballs ; over whole head ; in small of back ; in back and limbs. Heavy pain : in head. Pressure : about heart. Pressing : in rectum. Oppression : in stomach. Weight : in head, particularly in temples ; around eyes. Heaviness : of head ; of eyeballs and lids. Dulness : within head. Weakness : of arms. Weariness : of legs. Faintness : in stomach and bowels. Uneasiness : of bowels. Fulness : within head ; in stomach ; of bowels. Emptiness : in stomach. Numbness : in wrist joints. Tickling : in chest. Itching : of nasal mucous membrane ; of rash upon chest ; in hands and arms ; on legs and thighs ; heat of whole surface with ; in skin ; of scalp, legs and feet ; of external genitals. Its chief action appears to be upon the liver and the intestinal canal ; a marked influence is likewise exerted upon the brain. Accelerated action of heart and arteries, accompanied by hot skin, burning of face, great drowsiness, headache, inability to fix the mind, nausea, depression of spirits, pains in back, chest, abdomen and legs, lassitude, debility, sunken eyes, yellow tinge of conjunctiva, sallow countenance, diarrhœa of dark, bilious matter, or slimy and watery fluid, tenesmus, colic pains, throbbing pains in temples, distressing dreams, tympanitic distension of abdomen, constant desire to sleep. Intermittent fevers, with chills and sweat predominating ; the last stages of remittent and typhoid fevers, when diarrhœa sets in, with profuse sweats and general physical and mental exhaustion. TOUCH. PASSIVE MOTION. INJURIES. [45] [Corn.]. Scratching or rubbing : < itching. Young man, æt. 18 ; daily paroxysms of ague. Young man, æt. 20, sick seven or eight weeks, had taken usual remedies without effect ; ague. George Schafer, after catching cold ; inflammation of chest. *. Man, æt. 35, sick seven weeks with chills, fever and vomiting of blood ; remedy given in alternation with Tart. emet.

mouth_throat.text: Ulceration of tongue, gums and mouth; aphthæ. Burning in mouth, throat and stomach

Pungent, bitter, or insipid taste; yellowish or white fur on tongue. Ulceration of tongue, gums, and mouth; from cold, or gastric derangement; aphthæ. Sweating and burning in mouth, throat, and stomach, with desire for stool.

Pungent, bitter or insipid taste ; yellowish or white fur upon tongue. Ulceration of tongue, gums and mouth. Smarting in mouth and throat. Aphthous ulceration of mouth in children. Ulceration of buccal mucous membrane from a cold or gastric derangement. Smarting and burning in mouth, throat and stomach, with desire for stool.

stool_rectum.text: Loose, windy, dark stool, immediately after dinner. Burning in anus. Dark, bilious, offensive diarrhœa, with sallow complexion

Urgency to stool; early in morning in bed; with fulness and uneasiness of bowels; frequent but ineffectual. Diarrhœa with excessive debility and nervous irritability. Stools: dark, bilious, watery, mucous, with griping, burning, and tenesmus, nausea, drowsiness, dulness of the head, and general perspiration; dark green, thin and offensive; greenish slimy; mucous, bilious or watery; frequent and scanty; offensive flatus. Bearing-down pains in rectum and bowels, with urgent desire for stool. Hard, dry, scanty stool, with pressing in rectum. Ulceration of rectum. Bowel complaints with pains before, during, and after discharges. Dysenteries and diarrhœas with inactivity of liver.

Urging to stool ; early in morning in bed ; with fulness and uneasiness of bowels ; frequent but ineffectual. Diarrhœa, with excessive debility and nervous excitability. Diarrhœa of a dark and bilious, or watery and mucous character, with griping, burning and tenesmus, nausea, drowsiness, dulness of head and general perspiration. Stools : dark, bilious, very offensive ; dark green, thin and offensive ; greenish, slimy ; mucous, bilious or watery ; frequent and scanty ; discharge of offensive flatus. Bearing down pains in rectum and bowels, with urgent desire to go to stool. Hard, dry and scanty stool with pressing in rectum. Ulceration of mucus membrane of rectum. Bowel complaints generally, with pains in bowels before, during and after discharges. Dysenteries and diarrhœas, accompanied by inactivity of liver. Cholera infantum, bowel complaints of infants while teething ; bilious diarrhœa ; bilious colic ; jaundice ; biliary derangements generally. Chronic diarrhœa.

skin.text: Vesicular eczema of face in infants, with nursing sore mouth

Yellow or earthy appearance of skin. Heat of whole surface with itching, burning, or prickling sensations; by scratching or rubbing. Eczema, pruritus and similar affections of external genitals. Itching in paroxysms at night. Dry or moist eruptions; with cough. Vesicular eruptions; urticaria; miliaria; roseola.

Yellow or earthy appearance of skin. Heat of whole surface, with itching, burning or prickling sensations. Prickling, burning and itching sensation of skin. Itching of scalp, legs and feet, < by scratching or rubbing. Itching in paroxysms, < at night. Eczema, pruritis or similar affections of external genitals. Skin covered with copious clammy perspiration. Fine scarlet rash on breast, with itching. Dry or moist eruption ; scrofulosis with cough. Dry or moist tinea ; itching of scalp. Vesicular eruptions ; urticaria ; miliaria ; roseola.

keynotes.text: color="#800000">CORNUS CIRCINATA Round-leaved Dogwood Chronic malaria, hepatitis, jaundice. Weakness in morning. Pain in pit of stomach, with distended abdomen. Vesicular eruption associated with chronic liver disease or aphthous stomatitis.

A popular remedy for aphthous and ulcerated conditions of mucous membranes. Hale says he has seen it cure chronic ulceration of mouth and throat, which had recurred for many years. Corn. c. has had an extensive proving. It has caused liver derangement with aching eyeballs. Disturbed sleep. The symptoms are at night; on waking; by motion of any kind; from catching cold; from summer heat; > by coffee. The fever symptoms are identical with those of Cornus f.

_raw: Compare: Nux v., Hydrast., Chi., Eup. perf., Ars.
Compare : Cinchon., Eup. perf., Hydrast. and Nux vom

mental_emotional.text: Forgetful. Indifferent; with drowsiness. Indolence with loss of mental and physical energy. Unable to concentrate attention. Mind confused, particularly on rising in the morning. Depression and petulance.

Forgetful of familiar matters. Indifference with respect to subjects which usually interest. Drowsiness with indifference. Feeling of indolence and loss of mental and physical energy. Inability to fix mind upon any subject ; reads without being able to appreciate the ideas of the subject. Mind confused ; particularly on rising in morning. Depression of spirits and petulance. Constant dizziness. θ Inflammation of chest. Dulness and sense of fulness in head, with distension of stomach > after stool. Dulness and weight in head, particularly in temples, > by coffee. Heaviness of head, with nausea.

head.text: Dulness and weight in head, esp. temples, > by coffee. Heaviness of head, with nausea. Aching and throbbing pain over l. eyebrow. Dull pains over eyeballs; unusual pulsation extending to back of head. Pulsating headache in temples. Headaches, with drowsiness and confusion of ideas; semi-lateral headaches; deep-seated pains under vertex; dull, heavy pains over whole head, with drowsiness, lassitude, nausea, and general sweat. Headache; by walking, stooping, shaking head; > by coffee.

Aching and throbbing pain over right eyebrow. Dull pains over eyeballs ; unusual pulsations, extending from front to back of head. Pulsating headache in temples. Throbbing headache mostly in temples, > by coffee. Drawing sensation from back of head to nose. Deep seated pulsating pains in occipital and parietal regions. Heaviness of head, with great disposition to sleep, succeeded by severe cutting pains in whole head, and extreme mental and physical prostration, > by cup of strong coffee. Headaches, with drowsiness and confusion of ideas ; semilateral headaches ; deep seated pains under vertex ; dull heavy pains over whole head, with drowsiness, lassitude, nausea and general sweat. Shooting, aching or throbbing pains in head. Tensive, aching pains throughout whole head. Severe headache, with quick pulse and violent pains in bowels. *. Fulness and pains in head, with gastric derangement. *. Cerebral fulness, with constant tendency to sleep. *. Congestion of blood to head and face. Bilious cephalalgia. Headache < by walking, stooping or shaking head.

eyes.text: Eyes sunken, hollow, as after a debauch; dark circles under them, conjunctiva tinged yellow. Soreness of eyeballs; aching pains through them. Eyeballs and lids heavy, as if pressed down by a weight; inclination to close eyes in sleep. Herpes of lids.

Left eye weak, like a cloud over it ; elbows and wrists painful ; pains at waist, as if she would break in two ; sighs very often ; gagged, as if to vomit, very often in morning ; chilly sensations come on frequently, although she is warm ; pains run up side of trunk or body like lightning, seems as if they would give her a twist while running up. Eyes sunken, hollow ; dull and heavy as after a debauch ; dark circles under them ; yellowish tinge of conjunctiva. Sense of weight or a feeling of contraction around eyes. Soreness of eyeballs ; aching pains through them. Eyeballs and lids feel heavy, as if pressed down by a weight ; great inclination to close eyes in sleep. Scrofulous ophthalmia, herpes of eyelids.

nose.text: Prickling in nose and nasal bones. Coryza early in morning.
Pricking in nose and nasal bones. Drawing sensation from back of head to nose. Itching of nasal mucous membrane. Coryza early in morning.

face.text: Heat and burning in face; without redness. Countenance yellow, or pale, sallow, and sunken, indicating suffering and debility.
Heat and burning in face. Burning of cheeks without redness, but feel flushed. Countenance yellow or pale, sallow, sunken, and indicative of suffering and debility.

stomach_abdomen.text: Thirst for cold drinks. Eructations. Acid pyrosis; painful and slow digestion. Gagging as if to vomit in morning. Nausea, with confused and heavy pain in head. Nausea with bitter taste and aversion to all kinds of food, and desire for sour drinks. Sense of faintness and emptiness in stomach and bowels. Distension; burning; oppression: pulsating pain in stomach. Chronic hepatitis and bilious derangement. Constant working in bowels as if all in motion. Borborygmus. Distension > after loose stool. Griping in umbilical region; during stool.

APPETITE, THIRST. DESIRES, AVERSIONS. [14] [Corn.]. Thirst for cold drinks. Drinks little and often ; hunger soon after eating ; desire for sour things, pickles, pastry, cakes, etc. θ Inflammation of lungs. *. Eructations. Acid pyrosis ; painful and slow digestion. Gagging as if to vomit, in morning. Nausea with confused and heavy pain in head. Nausea, with bitter taste, and aversion to all kinds of food, and desire for sour drinks. Nausea, sticky sweat and feeling of exhaustion. Nausea, vomiting and pain in stomach, with headache. *. Nausea, vomiting and violent pains in bowels. *. Sensation of faintness in stomach and bowels. Sense of emptiness in stomach. Distension of stomach and bowels with wind. Burning sensation in stomach. Fulness and oppression in stomach, with bad taste and dry mouth. Pulsative pains in stomach, head and bowels. Pain in pit of stomach. Indigestion and heartburn. *. Chronic hepatitis and bilious derangements ; jaundice. Constant working of bowels, as if they were all in motion. Borborygmus ; large emission of very offensive flatus. Distension of bowels from wind, > by a loose fecal discharge. Griping in umbilical region, with much rumbling of wind. Contraction and shooting pains from centre of chest (thoracic muscles) down to lower part of abdomen, pains coming on severely at intervals and then remitting. Bearing down feeling in abdomen and rectum ; creating an urgent desire for stool. Violent pain in bowels, with purging. *. Abdominal pains more acute during stool.

urinary.text: Frequent desire to pass water. Urine scanty and high-coloured.
Frequent inclination to pass water. Difficult urination in morning in old men. *. Urine scanty and high colored.

male.text: Increased desire, but lack of power. Frequent strong and persistent erections during the night. Pruritus.
Increased sexual desire, but lack of power. Frequent strong and persistent erections during night.

chest_heart.text: Choking sensation in upper part of thorax. Soreness of chest on rising in morning. Stitches; bruised feeling; in chest and back. Dragging down on each side of chest. Shooting pains from centre of thorax to lower abdomen. Intermittent shooting pains in chest and abdomen. Rheumatic or neuralgic pains in chest, back, and limbs. Fine scarlet rash on chest, with, itching. Perceptible pulsations in chest. Palpitation of heart. Circulation accelerated.

Stitches in region of left clavicle extending towards right side, < by taking a deep breath ; constant tickling in chest compelling him to cough, with difficult expectoration ; constant dizziness ; chilliness followed by heat with thirst and finally sweat ; drinks little and often ; hunger soon after eating. θ Inflammation of lungs. *. Choking sensation in upper part of thorax. Soreness of chest on rising in morning. Stitch in right chest as from a knife thrust, with vertigo. *. Sore, bruised feeling or stitches in chest or back. Sensation of dragging, or bearing down, on each side of chest. Shooting pains from centre of thorax to lower part of abdomen. Intermittent shooting pains in chest and abdomen. Rheumatic or neuralgic pains in chest, back and limbs. Ineffectual urging to stool, followed by cutting pains in ribs of left side, with pain under left scapula as if a piece of flesh was being forcibly twisted out ; later, copious stool. *. Perceptible pulsations in chest. Palpitation of heart. Increased strength and frequency of pulse, with fever heat ; pulse quick and hard. *. Acceleration of circulation. Dragging pains in sides of thorax and in lumbar region, < by motion, bending over and turning in bed. Griping and shooting pains from centre of chest (thoracic muscles) to lower part of abdomen, pains severe at intervals. Fine scarlet rash upon chest, with itching.

back.text: Drawing pains at nape of neck. Dull pains in back. Sore pains in lumbar region, bending forward.

Sensation like a jerk or shock in nape of neck. *. Pains at the waist as if she would break in two ; pains run up whole left side of trunk or body like lightning, seems as if they would give her a twist while running up ; pain in elbows and wrist. Boring pain in shoulder blades. Dull pain in small of back, with drowsiness and lassitude. Sore pain in lumbar region, < when bending over, or to either side.

sleep.text: Drowsiness with entire loss of mental and physical energy; heavy feeling in head; depression of spirits; tendency to perspire. Sleep unrefreshing and disturbed by unpleasant dreams.

Great disposition to sleep, with entire loss of mental and physical energy ; heavy feeling in head. Drowsiness, with great depression of spirits and deep-seated pains in head ; disposition to perspire. Sleepy and weak during day, with dull pains in head, back and limbs. Sleep unrefreshing and disturbed by unpleasant dreams.

fever_chill.text: Chilliness, with nausea, dull pain in head, debility, and languor. Chilly sensation, followed by transient flushing. Flushes of heat and coldness in alternation, followed by cold perspiration. Transient flushes of heat pervading whole body, with shooting pains through brain. Paroxysm preceded for days by sleepiness, dull, heavy headache, sluggish flow of ideas; slight exercise causes sweat and great fatigue: during apyrexia, debility and painful diarrhœa; first moderate heat, then light sweat, ending with a crawling sort of chill; when all the stages seem aborted, and the patient says the chills amount to nothing; weak, languid, and loss of appetite. General clammy sweat, with headache, nausea, pain in back, lassitude, and confusion of ideas. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.

Chilliness, accompanied by nausea, dull pain in head and feelings of debility and languor. Chill with cold, clammy skin. *. Chilly sensation, succeeded by transient flushes of heat. Chilliness, followed by heat with thirst and finally sweat. θ Inflammation of lungs. *. Chill followed by heat with thirst, drinks often, but not much at a time, then sweat ; constant giddiness ; hungry soon after eating ; desire for sour things, later for sweets. *. First moderate heat, then light perspiration, ending with a crawling sort of chill, beginning in back and going upward. θ Intermittent fever. Increased temperature of body, hot sweat, fulness in head. *. Flushes of heat and coldness in alternation, followed by cold perspiration. Transient flushes of heat, pervading whole body, with shooting pains through brain. Heat : with violent headache ; thirst ; hot, but moist skin ; stupor. *. Paroxysm preceded for days by sleepiness, dull, heavy headache, sluggish flow of ideas ; slight exercise causes sweat and great fatigue ; during apyrexia, debility and painful diarrhœa ; first moderate heat, then light perspiration, ending with a crawling sort of chill ; when all the stages seem aborted and the patient says his chills amount to nothing ; weak, languid, loss of appetite. General perspiration, with nausea, drowsiness and heavy pain in head. General clammy sweat, with headache, nausea, pain in back, lassitude and confusion of ideas. Sweat rolls down from her ; chilly but warm ; cramps from sides of her waist, running towards pubes ; sleepy, but couldn't sleep all night ; had to get up and look out of window, she was so sleepless ; could not sleep in daytime, sweating all the time. *. Bilious remittents, and the characteristic gastric and intestinal symptoms present.

preparation.text: Fresh bark. A homoeopathic tincture of the fresh bark is administered in ulcerated conditions of the ucous membranes and in liver complaints and jaundice.

respiratory.text: Frequent inclination to expand chest by taking a long breath. Cough with sharp stitches in chest. Dry, spasmodic cough, or tedious chronic cough, with mucous expectoration. θ Scrofulosis.

extremities.text: Neuralgic sharp pains begin in right elbow, extending to hand and shoulder, passing down right side and then up left ; pain settled about heart, causing feeling of pressure and palpitation ; could not use arm because of pain and lameness ; hands and feet swollen, pains of a darting, needle-like kind, very severe ; difficulty of passing water. *. Sense of weakness and fatigue of arms. Burning and itching sensation in hands and arms. Numbness and stitches in wrist joints. *. Coldness of hands, following a loose stool. Blueness of fingers. *. Pain in right hip while lying in bed. Legs weak and tremulous, particularly when ascending ; sensation of weariness in legs. Itching on legs and thighs ; burning sensation in feet. Coldness of feet following a loose stool. Weakness of extremities. Cramps in popliteal spaces, with tension in flexor muscles, also in left arm. *.

modalities.text: REST. POSITION. MOTION. [35] [Corn.]. Lying : pain in right hip. Motion : pain in sides of thorax and lumbar region <. Turning in bed : pains in sides of thorax and lumbar region <. Shaking head : headache <. Bending over : pains in sides of thorax and lumbar region < ; pain in lumbar region <. Bending to either side : soreness in lumbar region <. Stooping : headache <. Walking : headache <. When ascending : legs weak and tremulous. Exercise : sweat and great fatigue from slight. In morning : on rising, mind confused ; gagging ; coryza early ; urging to stool, early in bed ; difficult urination, in old men ; soreness of chest on rising. Symptoms generally < on waking in morning. During day : sleepy and weak, with dull pains in head, back and limbs. At night : frequent erections ; sleepy but cannot sleep, must get up and look out of window ; itching in paroxysms <. Cold drinks : thirst for. From catching cold : ulceration of buccal mucous membrane ; inflammation of chest. Summer : debility, impaired mental energy, and great drowsiness in heat of.
